## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create final checklist for visual consistency before implementation freeze
- Capture baseline screenshots for all major pages and key states
- Document unresolved visual issues and ownership
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Screenshot naming convention standardized
  - Baseline set includes mobile + desktop for each page
  - Checklist includes accessibility and responsive checks

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Visual QA checklist completed
- [ ] Baseline screenshots committed/linked
- [ ] Outstanding visual issues logged as separate tickets
- [ ] PR includes summary report and owner assignments

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `qa`, `design-review`, `priority-high`
